ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_expertise" (
  "researcher_expertise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher expertise */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_expertise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_expertise_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "project_milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date of the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., data collection, data analysis) */,
  "contribution_level" TEXT /* Level of contribution (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_types" (
  "contribution_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution type */,
  "contribution_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution type (e.g., data collection, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_levels" (
  "contribution_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution level */,
  "contribution_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution level (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "project_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., lead researcher, co-researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., lead researcher, co-researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_contributors" (
  "publication_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication contributor */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "contribution_level" TEXT /* Level of contribution (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_contributors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_contributors_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "publication_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication metric */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., impact factor, h-index) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date of grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_agencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
